name: Lemon-Poppy Seed Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 package Lemon instant pudding mix and pie filling (4 servings)
recipeInstructions:
MUFFINS: Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease the bottoms and sides of 12 medium muffin cups, or line with paper baking cups. In a large bowl, whisk together oil, milk, eggs, lemon instant pudding mix, and pie filling until well blended. Stir in biscuit baking mix, poppy seeds, and lemon peel; mix thoroughly. Divide batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean. Allow to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to serve. GLAZE: In a small bowl, whisk together confectioners' sugar and lemon juice (about 3 teaspoons) until smooth. Drizzle over the warm muffins.
GLAZE: Whisk together powdered sugar and lemon juice (about 3 teaspoons) until smooth. Pour over hot muffins.
